# Marco Sosa Portfolio - Project Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
Personal portfolio website built with Vite-React. Currently displays name and app title, with plans for portfolio expansion. Configured for Cloudflare deployment.

## Setup Progress

- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md file created
- [x] Project Requirements Clarified (Vite-React with TypeScript)
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project (Added App.tsx with Marco Sosa name and title)
- [x] Install Required Extensions (None needed)
- [x] Compile the Project (Dependencies installed successfully)
- [x] Create and Run Task (Dev server running on port 5173)
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Development Notes
- Framework: Vite + React with TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Target: Cloudflare deployment
- Current Phase: Basic setup with name/title display
